name: Ethiopia Yirgacheffe Filter
description: Floral and citrus-forward single-origin coffee with a tea-like body, ideal for pour-over.
detailedDescreption: A bright, floral Ethiopian single-origin with layered citrus sweetness and a tea-like body. Best enjoyed as a pour-over where its clarity, delicate aromatics, and clean finish can fully shine.

name: Colombia Huila Espresso
description: Balanced espresso profile with caramel sweetness, red fruit, and smooth finish.
detailedDescreption: A balanced Colombian espresso that combines caramel sweetness with soft red-fruit notes. It delivers a rounded body and a smooth, lingering finish that works beautifully with or without milk.

name: House Blend
description: Approachable daily blend with chocolate and roasted nut notes for multiple brew methods.
detailedDescreption: An approachable house blend designed for everyday brewing. Expect familiar chocolate and roasted nut character with dependable balance across espresso, filter, and immersion methods.

name: Kenya AA Nyeri
description: Juicy blackcurrant and grapefruit with sparkling acidity and clean sweetness.
detailedDescreption: A lively Kenyan lot with signature blackcurrant intensity, grapefruit brightness, and sparkling acidity. The cup is juicy yet clean, with a sweet finish that keeps it elegant and vibrant.

name: Brazil Cerrado Natural
description: Chocolate-heavy cup with hazelnut sweetness and low acidity, great for milk drinks.
detailedDescreption: A comforting Brazilian natural with chocolate-forward depth, hazelnut sweetness, and very low acidity. Its fuller body makes it especially satisfying in espresso and milk-based drinks.

name: Guatemala Huehuetenango
description: Sweet stone fruit and cocoa in a medium-bodied cup for filter and AeroPress.
detailedDescreption: A versatile Guatemalan coffee offering sweet stone-fruit notes layered with gentle cocoa. Medium-bodied and balanced, it performs consistently in filter brews and AeroPress recipes.

name: Decaf Colombia Sugarcane
description: Full-flavored decaf with toffee sweetness and gentle citrus, no compromise cup.
detailedDescreption: A high-quality sugarcane-process decaf that keeps full flavour in the cup. Rich toffee sweetness meets mild citrus lift, delivering a satisfying coffee experience without compromise.

name: Rwanda Nyamasheke
description: Red apple and black tea notes with silky mouthfeel and elegant finish.
detailedDescreption: An elegant Rwandan coffee with red apple brightness and black-tea delicacy. The silky mouthfeel and polished finish make it a refined choice for clean filter preparation.

name: Morning Espresso Blend
description: Classic espresso blend with dark chocolate body and syrupy crema.
detailedDescreption: A classic espresso blend built for consistency and body. Dark chocolate richness, low-fruit profile, and syrupy crema make it ideal for daily shots and milk drinks.

name: Peru Cajamarca
description: Brown sugar and plum notes with balanced acidity and clean finish.
detailedDescreption: A sweet and balanced Peruvian coffee featuring brown sugar depth and subtle plum fruit. Its moderate acidity and clean finish make it easy to enjoy across brewing styles.

name: Costa Rica Tarrazu
description: Honey sweetness, orange peel, and milk chocolate in a versatile profile.
detailedDescreption: A versatile Costa Rican coffee with honey-like sweetness, orange-peel brightness, and milk-chocolate smoothness. Balanced enough for both espresso and filter use.

name: Ethiopia Guji Natural
description: Jammy blueberry and tropical fruit notes with perfumed aromatics.
detailedDescreption: A fruit-forward natural Ethiopian with jammy blueberry, tropical accents, and perfumed aromatics. Expect expressive sweetness and a vibrant cup profile.

name: Weekend Blend
description: Comforting cup with cocoa, biscuit sweetness, and low bitterness.
detailedDescreption: A smooth weekend blend with cocoa warmth, biscuit-like sweetness, and low perceived bitterness. Easy-drinking and approachable for any time of day.

name: India Monsooned Malabar
description: Low-acid and heavy-bodied coffee with spice and dark cocoa characteristics.
detailedDescreption: A distinctive monsooned profile with heavy body, very low acidity, and spicy dark-cocoa depth. Great for those who prefer bold, earthy, and intense cups.

name: Burundi Kayanza
description: Bright and lively cup with citrus zest and black tea complexity.
detailedDescreption: A bright Burundi with zesty citrus lift and black-tea complexity. Lively acidity is balanced by sweetness, creating a dynamic yet clean and structured cup.

name: Signature Espresso
description: Sweet and creamy espresso with toffee, cocoa nib, and cherry finish.
detailedDescreption: A sweet, creamy espresso blend featuring toffee richness, cocoa nib depth, and a soft cherry finish. Built for comfort, balance, and dependable daily extraction.

name: Nicaragua Jinotega
description: Soft caramel sweetness and stone-fruit notes with rounded body.
detailedDescreption: A rounded Nicaraguan profile with soft caramel sweetness and gentle stone-fruit nuance. Medium body and smooth structure make it broadly appealing.

name: Panama Geisha Reserve
description: Delicate jasmine aromatics with bergamot and honeyed sweetness.
detailedDescreption: A premium Geisha lot showcasing delicate jasmine aromatics, bergamot-like citrus florals, and honeyed sweetness. Complex, refined, and ideal for careful filter brewing.

name: Uganda Sipi Falls
description: Rich and syrupy with dark fruit and cocoa undertones.
detailedDescreption: A rich Ugandan coffee with syrupy texture, dark-fruit depth, and cocoa undertones. Full flavour and body make it excellent for espresso-focused brewing.

name: Mexico Chiapas Decaf
description: Smooth decaf with milk chocolate and orange sweetness.
detailedDescreption: A smooth and approachable decaf with milk-chocolate sweetness and a gentle orange note. Balanced, mellow, and suitable for both afternoon and evening cups.
